headline: Latest News In Electric Vehicles - Innovative Tool Enhances Design Efficiency for Onsemi Solutions
summary: onsemi has unveiled its Elite Pairing Studio, an innovative online design tool aimed at optimizing power electronics applications, including those used in electric vehicles. This first-of-its-kind platform facilitates the pairing of silicon carbide (SiC) MOSFETs and gate drivers, offering engineers enhanced visibility into device-level behavior to make more informed design decisions early in the development process. The Studio aims to reduce design iterations and risks by enabling efficient...

headline: onsemi Introduces Industry-First Elite Pairing Studio to Simplify Power Design
summary: onsemi Introduces Industry-First Elite Pairing Studio to Simplify Power Design The onsemi Elite Pairing Studio is an online design environment that simplifies pairing SiC MOSFETs and gate drivers for demanding power electronics applications, including AI data centers, electric vehicles, and industrial systems.
